response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack engineering experience, exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB at Optilyz and re:cinq. Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent) and demonstrated architecture, testing (TDD), and DevOps experience align well with the role, though no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience is mentioned.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling work directly matches the AI agent requirement
Strong testing/TDD culture, workshops, and DevOps/Kubernetes/Docker experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in primary stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience appears dated (pre-2018)
Vitest not explicitly mentioned, though general testing expertise is strong

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and recent Kotlin experience
